title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 10 lines).
summary_text: 1. High: URL-only quote posts now fail hard. [`scheduler.py:509`](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py) strips the status URL, then [`x_poster.py:69`](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/x_poster.py) rejects the empty `clean_text`; a post whose body is only an `x.com/.../status/...` link used to work, but now raises `ValueError` and will never post. 2. Medium: `twitter.com` quote detection is still wrong in both paths. [`scheduler.py:504`](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py) and [`scheduler.py:268`](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py) look for `"twitter.com/status/"`, but real URLs are `twitter.com/<user>/status/<id>`, so those posts won’t be recognized as quote tweets and may incorrectly require/upload an image. 3. No obvious secret-handling/security regression in this diff beyond the functional issues above.
